title: 10 best herbal teas for athlete's foot
description: Thyme teas helps with athlete's foot because of its antimicrobial properties, which combat the fungal infections that cause this common condition. The active compounds in thyme, such as thymol and carvacrol, have been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi like Candida and Trichophyton, which are responsible for athlete's foot. When consumed as a tea or applied topically, thyme has been traditionally used to treat fungal infections and reduce inflammation, promoting healthy skin and nail...
